behaviour_summary: Rufus synthesises listing copy, reviews, and Q&A to recommend products. Rewards descriptive, review-aligned, fact-dense content that answers natural language shopper questions.
scoring_note: Score each dimension and sum. Raw total out of 100 × 0.30 = contribution to overall score.

scoring_dimensions.label: Named protein source
scoring_dimensions.full_points_when: Named protein in title AND first or second bullet (e.g. 'Real chicken is the #1 ingredient')
scoring_dimensions.partial_points_when: Named protein present but not prominently featured
scoring_dimensions.zero_when: Protein source vague or generic (e.g. 'animal protein', 'meat meal')

scoring_dimensions.label: Fact density
scoring_dimensions.full_points_when: Majority of bullets contain specific verifiable facts with numbers, named ingredients, or named mechanisms
scoring_dimensions.partial_points_when: Mix of specific facts and generic claims
scoring_dimensions.zero_when: Majority of content is generic marketing language

scoring_dimensions.label: Life stage explicit and accurate
scoring_dimensions.full_points_when: Life stage stated correctly using AAFCO language (Adult, Puppy, Senior)

scoring_dimensions.label: Functional ingredients named with benefit
scoring_dimensions.full_points_when: 3+ functional ingredients named with mechanism (e.g. 'L-Carnitine supports fat metabolism')
scoring_dimensions.zero_when: No functional ingredients named — generic benefit claims only

scoring_dimensions.label: No prohibited superlatives
scoring_dimensions.full_points_when: No prohibited superlatives anywhere in title, bullets, or description

scoring_dimensions.label: AAFCO statement visible
scoring_dimensions.full_points_when: AAFCO explicitly mentioned in bullets or description with life stage
scoring_dimensions.partial_points_when: AAFCO referenced without life stage specificity
scoring_dimensions.zero_when: AAFCO not mentioned in visible content
